caption: Don't let a bare cupboard stress you out! With just eggs and bread, you can create a week's worth of tasty meals. We've put together 5 simple recipes that UK home cooks can whip up with minimal ingredients. Remember, Peppera can help you turn what you have into what's for dinner!
hooks: Transform eggs and bread into 5 delicious meals!
Stuck with only eggs and bread? Here's what you can make!
Simple ingredients, incredible meals. Let's get cooking!
platform_notes: Instagram carousel post - ensure the carousel flow is smooth with text-only hook and CTA slides. Use warm, appetizing food photography for recipe slides.

brand_profile.name: Peppera
brand_profile.description: A meal-planning assistant that turns rough ingredients into practical dinner ideas.

mascot.name: Peppera
mascot.description: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character with a round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges, large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, a small open-mouth smile showing warmth. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Has simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. The overall style is flat 2D cartoon illustration with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, and no shading or gradients.
mascot.role: The recurring face of Peppera's TikTok and Instagram content — the main character in every visual story.
mascot.visualPrompt: A cute anthropomorphic green bell pepper character named Peppera. Round bulbous body narrowing at the top, bright lime-green skin with subtle darker green vertical ridges. Large expressive oval eyes with white sclera and small black pupils, thin curved black eyebrows, small open-mouth smile. Wears a red bandana tied around the top of the head with the knot visible on the right side. Simple thin black-stroke arms and legs with small rounded hands and feet. Flat 2D cartoon illustration style with bold outlines, vibrant saturated colors, no shading or gradients. Solid color background.
usageRules: Always include the mascot in mascot-led slides: hook, problem, escalation, reaction, discovery, cta.
Never include the mascot in meal_reveal or benefit slides — those are food-only.
The mascot must always have the red bandana, green pepper body, and same face shape.
Vary only the pose and expression to match the slide role — never vary the core design.
Never add accessories not in the spec (no chef hat, no utensils unless the slide prompt explicitly calls for them).

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.text:
5 Meals From Just Eggs and Bread
When your fridge is giving... minimal
slides.visual_goal: Bold title card with brand colours

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Recipe 1 made with eggs and bread, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

ingredients: Maple syrup and berries to serve
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, and vanilla in a bowl.
Dip each bread slice into the mixture, coating both sides.
Fry in butter over medium heat until golden brown on both sides.
Serve with maple syrup and fresh berries.
recipe.proTip: Stale bread works best as it absorbs the egg mixture without falling apart.

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Recipe 2 made with eggs and bread, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Preheat oven to 180°C. Grease a baking dish.
Place bread cubes in dish, sprinkle with raisins.
Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, and cinnamon together.
Pour egg mixture over bread and bake for 30-35 mins until golden.
recipe.proTip: Let the bread soak in the egg mixture for at least 15 minutes before baking for best results.

slides.text: 🍳 RECIPE 3: EGG FRIED RICE WITH BREAD CROUTONS
slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Recipe 3 made with eggs and bread, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

recipe.recipeName: Egg Fried Rice with Bread Croutons
ingredients: 2 slices of bread, cut into cubes
steps: Toss bread cubes in 1/2 tbsp oil and bake at 180°C for 10 mins until golden.
Heat remaining oil in a wok, scramble the eggs and set aside.
Add garlic and rice, stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add egg, soy sauce, spring onion and bread croutons. Toss to combine.
recipe.proTip: Using cold leftover rice prevents the dish from becoming mushy.

slides.text: 🍳 RECIPE 4: BAKED EGGS WITH BREAD SOLDIERS
slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Recipe 4 made with eggs and bread, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Preheat oven to 190°C. Butter small ramekins.
Crack an egg into each ramekin, add cream and season.
Place ramekins in a baking dish with hot water coming halfway up.
Bake for 10-12 mins until eggs are set but still runny. Serve with toasted bread fingers.
recipe.proTip: The water bath prevents the eggs from overcooking and keeps them creamy.

slides.image_prompt: Professional food photography, Recipe 5 made with eggs and bread, beautifully plated, on a ceramic plate, natural soft window lighting with warm tones, slight depth of field, appetising textures and high detail, styled on a rustic wooden table with subtle props like cutlery and a linen napkin in the background, 45-degree dining angle, full frame composition filling the entire image with no empty white space, editorial food magazine quality --ar 1:1

steps: Sauté onion in butter until soft. Layer half the bread in a baking dish.
Add half the onion, cheese, then repeat layers.
Whisk eggs, milk, salt and pepper. Pour over bread.
Let stand 15 mins, then bake at 180°C for 35-40 mins until golden.
recipe.proTip: Assemble the strata the night before and refrigerate for an easy weekend breakfast.
